trans-unit.source: Your payment for order [1]{order_name}[/1] from [1]{shop_name}[/1] has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: Your payment for order [1]{order_name}[/1] from [1]{shop_name}[/1] has been canceled.

trans-unit.source: Your payment for order [1]{order_name}[/1] from [1]{shop_name}[/1] has been partially charged.
trans-unit.target: Your payment for order [1]{order_name}[/1] from [1]{shop_name}[/1] has been partially charged.

trans-unit.source: Your payment for order [1]{order_name}[/1] from [1]{shop_name}[/1] has been partially refunded.
trans-unit.target: Your payment for order [1]{order_name}[/1] from [1]{shop_name}[/1] has been partially refunded.

trans-unit.source: Follow your order and download your invoice on our store, go to the %order_history_label% section of your customer account.
trans-unit.target: Follow your order and download your invoice on our store, go to the %order_history_label% section of your customer account.

trans-unit.source: If you have a guest account, you can follow your order via the %guest_tracking_label% section on our shop.
trans-unit.target: If you have a guest account, you can follow your order via the %guest_tracking_label% section on our shop.
